note: Advisory sandbox externalization + parity proof. ADDITIVE-PARITY only. Emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never a governance PASS.
title: Externalize the six language_gate allowlists to JSON (additive-parity)

change.what: ADDED ALLOWLISTS_JSON_PATH, EXTERNALIZED_ALLOWLISTS registry, and load_allowlist(name, json_path=None) which PREFERS the externalized JSON and FALLS BACK to the hardcoded Python constant when the JSON is absent/omits the key. The six Python constants (STRUCTURAL 66 / STATUS_LABEL 105 / FRAGMENT 65 / TECH_REFERENCE 53 / CENSUS_VERB 98 / ENTITY 19) REMAIN untouched as source-of-truth fallback. effective_*/scan/decide runtime paths are unchanged — purely additive.
change.data_file_note: reviewable externalized COPY, dumped directly from the live constants (sorted). Kept inside the build dir for multi-agent isolation; core.load_allowlist defaults to language_gate/allowlists_v1.json and falls back to constants when that path is absent.

what_it_proves: each of the six externalized sets, loaded via core.load_allowlist(name, json_path=REAL_JSON), is BYTE-IDENTICAL (== as a set) to its hardcoded Python constant -> CHECK_OK
the loader FALLS BACK to the Python constants when the JSON path is absent (source-of-truth fallback preserved, never deleted)
runtime caches _RUNTIME_STRUCTURAL/_RUNTIME_ENTITY reset before each parity check
MINIMAL MUTATION of the real JSON (drop one member of STRUCTURAL_ALLOWLIST) -> CHECK_REJECTED; parity is NOT relaxed to admit a drifted copy
MINIMAL MUTATION (add one bogus ENTITY term) -> CHECK_REJECTED (extra_in_json flagged); missing-key -> CHECK_REJECTED
FREEZE-ORDER HELD: re-ran TH-3 frozen golden -> 5/5, NO drift (additive edit changes no gate behavior)
chess_patches_applied: externalize = reviewable copy, NEVER delete the source of truth (constants remain; loader only prefers-then-falls-back)
byte-identical == parity asserted against the untouched constants; no strawman, no relaxation
negative fixture is a one-element minimal mutation of the REAL on-disk JSON, rejected
freeze-order: TH-3 golden re-run -> 5/5 no drift (never re-baselined)
isolation: JSON copy written inside build dir; only the ONE named gate file edited, additively
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (only the named gate file edited, additively; no tracked file overwritten/deleted)
exit_gate_B2: WI-6 done (six allowlists externalized to a byte-identical reviewable JSON, constants preserved as fallback, no golden drift).
next_action: remaining B2 items (WI-2/WI-3/WI-4/WI-5) per build plan
